queues.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
queues.required_artifact: pitch sent or incident row explaining why it could not be sent

queues.acceptance: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
queues.required_artifact: checkout-safe audit-to-$97 pitch flow verified by dry run/test and ledger row
queues.trigger: audits delivered but paid conversion is weak

queues.acceptance: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
queues.required_artifact: 10 ranked strong-trigger leads with evidence URL/excerpt and weak-signal exclusions

queues.acceptance: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
queues.required_artifact: revenue-evidence snapshot proving checkout/payment state and excluding tests
queues.trigger: real revenue remains zero or unverified

queues.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
queues.required_artifact: 10 value-first audit artifacts/outreach rows with trigger_context and self-serve CTA
queues.trigger: market lead queue needs trigger-specific artifacts

queues.acceptance: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
queues.required_artifact: rewrite audit artifact ending around implementation-ready fix pack, no human-contact CTA
queues.trigger: paid conversion bottleneck requires stronger value proof before more volume

queues.acceptance: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
queues.required_artifact: one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next 3 agent orders in latest_ceo_directive

ceo.done_when: latest_ceo_directive names one bottleneck, one kill/scale decision, and next agent orders
ceo.owns: bottleneck decision, kill/scale orders, and escalation gates

growth.done_when: audit artifact or outreach row includes exact trigger context and no-call self-serve CTA
growth.owns: turn qualified trigger evidence into value-first audit artifact/outreach

market.done_when: lead has URL, contact route, trigger_type, trigger_excerpt, and signal_strength >= 6
market.owns: find public buying-trigger evidence and reject weak/no-trigger leads

ops-finance.done_when: company_brain numbers match ledgers and false revenue is excluded
ops-finance.owns: truth ledger, revenue evidence, attribution, incident reports, and kill criteria

support.done_when: audit/pitch/payment event is written to customer ledger and HOT_LEAD state is advanced
support.owns: audit delivery, inbox classification, checkout handoff, and fulfillment queue
